mapper.delete: DELETE FROM batch.process_staging WHERE ctid IN ( SELECT ctid FROM batch.process_staging WHERE staged_at < now() - make_interval(hours => #{retentionHours}) ORDER BY staged_at LIMIT #{batchSize} )
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM batch.process_staging WHERE staged_at < now() - make_interval(hours => #{retentionHours})

SELECT c.relname FROM pg_inherits i JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = i.inhrelid JOIN pg_class p ON p.oid = i.inhparent JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = p.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname = 'batch' AND p.relname = 'process_staging' AND c.relname ~ '^process_staging_p[0-9]{8}$' AND substring(c.relname FROM 'p([0-9]{8})$') < #{cutoffYmd}
